requirements.target: a JSON payload containing a list of strings under the ' input ' key
requirements.source: The core functional requirement is the /v1/embeddings POST endpoint, which must accept a JSON payload containing a list of strings under the 'input' key.

requirements.target: a simple JSON status of { " status " : " ok " } , serving as a readiness and liveness check for orchestrators
requirements.source: Specifically, the /health GET endpoint must provide a simple JSON status of {"status": "ok"}, serving as a readiness and liveness check for orchestrators.

rules.description: including the kernel name ( os.uname()[2 ] ) and a boolean indicator of Docker containerization ( os.path.exists('/.dockerenv '

requirements.source: Furthermore, the /ver GET endpoint requires the service to expose version information, author details, a build timestamp, and crucial environmental data, including the kernel name (os.uname()[2]) and a boolean indicator of Docker containerization (os.path.exists('/.dockerenv')).

requirements.target: a simple HTML page displaying the author 's ASCII art signature and version details

rules.description: acting as a quick confirmation that the service is running correctly

requirements.source: The root path (/) must serve a simple HTML page displaying the author's ASCII art signature and version details, acting as a quick confirmation that the service is running correctly.

requirements.target: the specific host / kernel that served the request

rules.description: providing the necessary audit trail for tracing requests across a distributed system

requirements.source: This event must explicitly record the specific host/kernel that served the request, providing the necessary audit trail for tracing requests across a distributed system.

requirements.target: to be using an embedding_processing.py file where another developer will put the processing engine of this service
requirements.source: This API needs to be using an embedding_processing.py file where another developer will put the processing engine of this service.

requirements.target: a shell scaffolding of / a class set

rules.description: so he can do his part but match the overall service structure
